name: dageno-mcp-growth-playbook
description: Turn Dageno content opportunities into SEO + GEO content plans with prompt demand, keyword demand, citation intelligence, fallback-safe SERP enrichment, and publish-ready briefs.

seo_metrics_api.recommended_provider: any approved search volume and keyword difficulty API

serp_retrieval.recommended_provider: approved SERP API or user-provided export

metadata.minimum_permissions: Dageno API access required; SEO metrics, page fetch, and SERP enrichment are optional connectors.
metadata.data_access_policy: Do not assume hidden access to private search APIs, page crawlers, or Google scraping. Fall back to Dageno-only and user-provided inputs when optional connectors are missing.
